CFBLOG_DB.description: Canonical D1 database for posts, categories, menus, media metadata, redirects, settings, revisions, and schema versions.

CFBLOG_MEDIA.description: R2 bucket for uploaded images and attachments.

CFBLOG_CACHE.description: Optional low-risk cache namespace. Canonical content must stay in D1 and R2.

SITE_URL.description: Set this to the deployed site origin, such as `https://your-worker.your-subdomain.workers.dev` or your custom domain. CFblog uses it for canonical URLs, feeds, sitemaps, and admin mutation origin checks.

ENVIRONMENT.description: Use `production` for the primary deployed Worker. Local development can use `development` from `.dev.vars`.

CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN.description: Cloudflare Access team domain for admin authentication, for example `https://your-team.cloudflareaccess.com`.

CF_ACCESS_AUD.description: Cloudflare Access application audience tag for the admin Access application.
